CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Mtoion To Disqualify R. Wesley Pratt And The Law Firm Of Brent, Fiol & Pratt Llp As Attorneys Of Record For Plaintiffs
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS' Motion To Disqualify R. Wesley Pratt And The Law Firm Of Brent, Fiol & Pratt LLP As Attorneys Of Record For Plaintiffs is denied. Defendant fails to provide sufficient information about the prior cases where Mr. Pratt represented Sutter West Bay Hospitals or affiliates to permit the court to determine if any of those cases have a substantial relationship with this case. Mr. Pratt's prior representation of Sutter West Bay Hospitals and its affiliates in the defense of medical malpractice claims does not, without an explanation of how the facts and circumstances of those cases are similar to this case, show that there is a substantial relationship between any of the prior cases and this medical malpractice case. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
